analysis: The project is a website about black holes with existing UI elements but needs enhancements for animated objects, slides, and overall theme consistency. The current theme is not fully developed for a black hole topic, and the animations and interactive elements are incomplete.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS to include dark, cosmic-themed colors, animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements to create an immersive black hole experience.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including event listeners for the new buttons added in the HTML.
